name: Rogz Kiddycat Safety Collar Xsmall Lime Paws
shortDescription: Rogz KiddyCat Safety Collar is snag-proof and durable. Made from a soft, pliable material, this collar is ideal for sensitive cats. The break-away safety buckle features three variable load settings that break open under enough strain from your cat to allow a safe escape.
